copilot_dispatch_reason: Governance-rule wording is cross-file and subjective; second-opinion from gpt-5.4 high valuable for drift detection across AGENTS triad.

findings.title: Distributed Governance Rule bullet overloaded; optionality clause duplicates cross-cutting note
findings.description: AGENTS.md:330 is grammatically valid but packs enforcement + workflow exemptions + exclusive-write owners + resource-map optionality guidance into a single bullet. The tail clause 'resource-map.md is optional at any level — copy it from .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/templates/resource-map.md when a packet wants a lean path ledger alongside implementation-summary.md' duplicates the cross-cutting note at AGENTS.md:268 and switches register from enforcement to usage guidance, reading as bolted on.
findings.fix_suggestion: Drop the optionality tail clause from §5 governance rule. Keep resource-map.md in the authored-doc enumeration; rely on §3 cross-cutting note (line 268) as the single source for optionality + copy-from-templates guidance.

findings.title: Documentation Levels Level-3 row drift between AGENTS.md and fs_enterprises sibling
findings.description: AGENTS.md:265 says 'Level 2 + decision-record.md (+ optional research.md)'. AGENTS_example_fs_enterprises.md:294 says 'Level 2 + decision-record.md (+ optional research.md, resource-map.md)'. Since resource-map.md is framed as any-level cross-cutting via §3 notes, enumerating it only on Level-3 in one sibling creates reader confusion about whether resource-map.md is Level-3-specific.
findings.fix_suggestion: Option A (preferred): drop 'resource-map.md' from fs_enterprises:294 to match AGENTS.md and keep cross-cutting docs in the §3 note only. Option B: add 'resource-map.md' to AGENTS.md:265 to match fs_enterprises. Either way, sync the triad.

findings.title: No explicit writer for resource-map.md in Distributed Governance Rule
findings.description: AGENTS.md:330 assigns @deep-research exclusive write for research/research.md and @debug exclusive write for debug-delegation.md. resource-map.md is in the authored-doc list but has no owner declaration, leaving it implicitly 'any agent following the authored-doc rule.' Readers may assume parallel ownership and search in vain for a resource-map owner agent.
findings.fix_suggestion: Append one sentence: 'resource-map.md has no exclusive writer — any agent following this governance rule may author it.' Place after the @debug exclusive-write sentence for symmetry.

findings.title: AGENTS_Barter.md intentionally unchanged (AUDIT-C)
findings.description: AGENTS_Barter.md is a symlink into /Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Barter/coder/AGENTS.md. Its line ~372 governance rule uses generic 'spec folder docs (*.md)' glob phrasing that implicitly covers resource-map.md. AUDIT-C rationale (minimize cross-repo drift) still holds; no change recommended. Recorded for traceability.

findings.title: Cross-cutting note same 4-file set across CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, fs_enterprises
findings.description: All three active-in-Public docs list the same 4 cross-cutting docs (handover.md, debug-delegation.md, research.md, resource-map.md) with only formatting differences (em-dash vs hyphen, note-block vs paragraph). No semantic drift. All 4 template files exist at .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/templates/ root, matching the 'copy from templates/' pointer.

questions_answered.q1_agents_md_330_grammar: Grammatically valid; no run-ons or double negatives. Semantically overloaded (enforcement + exemption + ownership + optionality in one bullet) but not broken.
questions_answered.q2_optionality_clause_flow: Bolted on. Switches register from enforcement to usage guidance and duplicates AGENTS.md:268 cross-cutting note. See AG-01.
questions_answered.q3_exemptions_preserved: Yes. research/iterations/*.md, research/deep-research-*.md, research/research.md progressive-update exemption, @deep-research exclusive-write, @debug exclusive-write all intact.
questions_answered.q4_fs_enterprises_level3_row_drift: Drift confirmed. AGENTS.md:265 lacks resource-map.md; fs_enterprises:294 includes it. See AG-02.
questions_answered.q5_barter_no_change_sound: Sound. Generic 'spec folder docs (*.md)' glob implicitly covers resource-map.md; AUDIT-C rationale (minimize cross-repo drift in symlinked shared file) holds. See AG-04.
questions_answered.q6_claude_md_cross_cutting_match: Match. Same 4-file set in all three docs; only punctuation/formatting differs. See AG-05.
questions_answered.q7_resource_map_owner: Implicit 'any agent following the authored-doc rule.' No exclusive writer declared, which is reasonable for a non-workflow-owned optional doc. Recommend short clarifier (AG-03) rather than full owner clause.

notes: Iteration 04 is missing from the review/iterations/ directory; iterations 01, 02, 03, 05 present. Not a finding in this dimension's scope — flagged for orchestrator awareness only.
